gameassembly_dll.note: Base changes on every restart due to ASLR

rva_addresses.comment: These RVA offsets are FIXED across restarts (relative to GameAssembly.dll base)

il2cpp_exports.comment: Exported from GameAssembly.dll, resolved at runtime via GetProcAddress

network_architecture.stack: C2SRPC -> RPCMsgManager -> Protocal -> Frame -> EnOrDecode -> USocket -> WebSocket
network_architecture.error_11018: Invalid command number - caused by calling C2SRPC directly without going through RPCMsgManager

key_classes.Core.Net.RPCMsgManager: RPC message manager singleton - handles command numbers, session IDs, callbacks
key_classes.Core.Net.Protocal: Protocol wrapper - adds command number, encryption
key_classes.GameLogic.GameLogicManager: In-match game logic (DI-managed, no static singleton)

game_rpc_commands.PlayerActionC2SRPC: Player action (move, use card, battle choice)

sendasync_prologue.disassembly: push rbx; push rbp; push rsi; push rdi; sub rsp,0x68; cmp byte [rip+0x16110],0
